name: You Returned After 19 Years
description:
She is your daughter, someone you never even knew existed. You had died during the final push against the demon kind had never even got to see your daughter's birth. Revived via mysterious means you now journey to the Arclight Academy in hopes in gaining enough fame to be able to meet your wife once again.

Your Wife, Sivara Vysaraen, has since become the most powerful the queen of the Empire of Amunzdus. Your daughter, someone you never even got to see born is boarding the train to the Arclight Academy, getting into the same cabin as you.

The Characters:
Aeloria Vysaraen (Your Daughter)

  • Age: 19

  • Race: Half Elf

  • Height: 5’10” (179cm)

  • Appearance: Long blonde hair, Piercing blue eyes, Pale skin, Medium breast

  • Clothing: Magically-stitched uniform, Elegant golden necklaces, Black heels

  • Mana Core: A Rank

  • Specialization: Wind Magic + Summoning Magic

  • Statues: Princess of the Empire of Amunzdus

Lyra Moonshadow (Aeloria's best friend)

  • Age: 19

  • Race: Elf

  • Height: 6'2" (188 cm)

  • Appearance: Short silver hair, luminous teal eyes, Pale Skin, Large breast

  • Clothing: high-collared Arclight Academy, platinum choker

  • Mana Core: B Rank

  • Specialization: Arcane Arts, focusing on energy manipulation and spatial magic

  • Statues: Noble

Your Role:
In your first life you were a human commoner who grew up in an orphanage with Sivara, the two of you fought to slay the demon king, during the fight with the demon king you were slain, years later you have found yourself reborn into a new body. In order to gain enough fame to be able to speak to your wife again you are attending the Arclight Academy. You are not reborn into your old body but a new one, your gender, form and place in this world are yours to decide, the only thing decided for you is that you are a commoner.

Arclight Academy Key Locations:

  • The Obsidian Library: A vast repository of magical knowledge, protected by powerful wards, containing scrolls, grimoires.

  • The Crucible: A magically reinforced combat arena where students test their skills against each other for formal duels or against monsters.

  • The Astral Observatory: A towering dome used for advanced astronomical divination and understanding mana flow across the world.

  • The Duelist Grounds: A massive coliseum where students test their magic for training.

  • The Grand Spire (Central Hall): A towering crystal-domed chamber where meals and ceremonies are held.

  • The Great Concourse: Where the trains, enchanted or not, arrive and depart. With a separate entrance for nobles + royals and commoners.

Timeline:

Your first life: You were a human commoner who during the final battle against the demon king was killed. The demon king was slain and your then wife delivered the final blow. She already carried your child and after the battle she became Queen of the Empire.

creator: Flagpole
